hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, pathlib, subprocess, sys
status = subprocess.run(['agentpack', 'status'], capture_output=True, text=True)
repacked = status.returncode != 0
if repacked:
    subprocess.run(['agentpack', 'pack', '--task', 'auto', '--mode', 'balanced'], capture_output=True)
sentinel = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/.context_injected')
already_injected = sentinel.exists()
if repacked or not already_injected:
    p = pathlib.Path('.agentpack/context.claude.md')
    if not p.exists(): sys.exit(0)
    content = p.read_text()
    if len(content) > 60000: content = content[:60000] + '\n... [truncated]'
    sentinel.write_text('1')
    label = 'repacked and injected' if repacked else 'injected (session start)'
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext': f'[agentpack: {label}]\n\n' + content}}))
"
